Cheeki's Mods Archive
Archive › NPC Faction Loadouts

NPC FACTION LOADOUTS

Weapon drop chances per faction & rank

🔧
Work in Progress

Still digging through the game files and cross-referencing everything. Some drop chances, attachments, and weapon names might not be accurate yet. Use this as a rough reference for now, not a definitive source. When I'm sure I have the right info I want to start including the drop chance into the weapon rankings, at least as a side-note (this weapon is super good but super rare, try to farm it on these guys etc.)

Drop Chance:
 ≥ 10% / High
 5–9% / Medium-high
 2–4% / Medium
 1–2% / Low
 < 1% / Rare
Attachments:
SCO Scope   GL Grenade Launcher   SIL Silencer   RNG Random
Select Faction
Loners
74 unique weapons  ·  8 ranks defined
